message:
feat(fuzz): add stdlib and ctype fuzz targets (bd-2hh.4)

Add two new structure-aware fuzz targets:

- fuzz_stdlib: Exercises strtol/strtoul/strtoll/strtoull/strtoimax/strtoumax,
  strtod/strtof, atoi/atol/atoll/atof, qsort, and cross-function consistency.
  Checks endptr bounds, signed/unsigned agreement, and sort order invariants.

- fuzz_ctype: Exercises all is_*/to_* classifiers with partition invariants
  (alnum = alpha|digit, digit ⊂ xdigit), case round-trip verification, and
  determinism checks across all 256 byte values.

Includes seed corpus (12 stdlib seeds, 7 ctype seeds) and updates
fuzz_nightly.sh to run the new targets. Total fuzz targets: 7 → 9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,4 +48,14 @@ name = "fuzz_scanf"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_scanf.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_stdlib"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_stdlib.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_ctype"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_ctype.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [workspace]

@@ -34,6 +34,8 @@ TARGETS=(
     fuzz_resolver
     fuzz_regex
     fuzz_scanf
+    fuzz_stdlib
+    fuzz_ctype
 )
 
 # Parse CLI arguments
